query:
SELECT language, COUNT(*) as total,
  SUM(CASE WHEN description IS NOT NULL AND description != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_description,
  SUM(CASE WHEN eligibility IS NOT NULL AND eligibility != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_eligibility
FROM grant_translations 
GROUP BY language;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user cK99zxEtGoTfC1g.7228e2c6a840 --database ne96tB4yURpkfMNLLJuy9T --execute 
SELECT language, COUNT(*) as total,
  SUM(CASE WHEN description IS NOT NULL AND description != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_description,
  SUM(CASE WHEN eligibility IS NOT NULL AND eligibility != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_eligibility
FROM grant_translations 
GROUP BY language;
